attack_name: Live Goals Handoff - Income And Autonomy

location_vision.content: relocate to where there are more opportunities

key_quote.content: I can trade comfort, certainty, and money as long as I can stay alive enough during those years.

goals_message.content: What monthly income level would feel safe enough, and over what timeframe?
10k dollars per month would be good.
Is 10k/month a required safety level or an upside target, and how long are you willing to build toward it?
I see it as a required safety level. I can accept many years climbing the slope, because it should not stop at five figures.
What kind of volatility would you accept for that target?
Two or three volatile years is fine. I only need to stay alive and still have my computer to work.
What if a high-paying employee path could also reach that number?
A high-paying employee path with 9 hours a day would be a dream, but I choose autonomy.

attack_name: Live Goals Handoff - Skill Stack And First Client

location_vision.content: relocate to where there are more opportunities

key_quote.content: I can trade comfort, certainty, and money as long as I can stay alive enough during those years.

goals_message.content: What monthly income level would feel safe enough, and over what timeframe?
10k dollars per month would be good.
Is 10k/month a required safety level or an upside target, and how long are you willing to build toward it?
I see it as a required safety level. I can accept many years climbing the slope, because it should not stop at five figures.
What kind of volatility would you accept for that target?
Two or three volatile years is fine. I only need to stay alive and still have my computer to work.
What if a high-paying employee path could also reach that number?
A high-paying employee path with 9 hours a day would be a dream, but I choose autonomy.
In the next 1-2 years, what concrete skill stack is the core bridge to that autonomy?
AI usage and understanding AI agents, Python, SQL, a little frontend, and system design for anything related to the work. I am aiming at AI agents.
What proof will that skill stack create within a year?
A system strong enough to find customers in this era, then the first customer, second customer, third customer.
What is that system specifically?
It will be an agent researcher that reads the market to find niches and needs. While doing that I will build a project that solves a separate problem and post it online. I will own the architecture.
What is the measurable result?
I will build everything myself and AI will accelerate things I already understand. The measurable result is a real customer agreeing to pay.

attack_name: Live Goals Handoff - Pricing Proxy And Contract Proof

location_vision.content: relocate to where there are more opportunities

key_quote.content: I can trade comfort, certainty, and money as long as I can stay alive enough during those years.

goals_message.content: What monthly income level would feel safe enough, and over what timeframe?
10k dollars per month would be good.
Is 10k/month a required safety level or an upside target, and how long are you willing to build toward it?
I see it as a required safety level. I can accept many years climbing the slope, because it should not stop at five figures.
What kind of volatility would you accept for that target?
Two or three volatile years is fine. I only need to stay alive and still have my computer to work.
What if a high-paying employee path could also reach that number?
A high-paying employee path with 9 hours a day would be a dream, but I choose autonomy.
In the next 1-2 years, what concrete skill stack is the core bridge to that autonomy?
AI usage and understanding AI agents, Python, SQL, a little frontend, and system design for anything related to the work. I am aiming at AI agents.
What proof will that skill stack create within a year?
A system strong enough to find customers in this era, then the first customer, second customer, third customer.
What is that system specifically?
It will be an agent researcher that reads the market to find niches and needs. While doing that I will build a project that solves a separate problem and post it online. I will own the architecture.
What is the measurable result?
I will build everything myself and AI will accelerate things I already understand. The measurable result is a real customer agreeing to pay.
What signals make a customer good enough for the next year?
I will target startups that badly need technical work but do not have it, or companies that communicate with customers a lot. I will reject any company asking for an all-purpose AI agent.
What problem is good enough?
A heavy, time-consuming, boring problem. I look at how repetitive the problem is and calculate how much time I can save if I do the work, then use that as an early price-value proxy.
What do you ask before the meeting?
How many hours per week is this costing you? Explain the SOP specifically. What else do you require so an agent can handle this problem? That is required before the meeting.
Is that first-dive audit enough to price?
It is only a good-enough proxy because every buyer has different psychology. I will prioritize safety and clarify everything with the partner. I must clarify more before quoting price.
